title: Rieekan (disambiguation)
content:
'''Rieekan''' can refer to:

*'''[[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]]''' a famous military commander of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
*'''[[Rieekan (SIS)|Rieekan]]''' the [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] [[Bureau Chief]] with the [[Republic Strategic Information Service]]

{{Disambig}}
